title: SB&R Craft
description: A vanilla-plus adventure modpack centered around the Create Aeronautics mod!
body:
## Overview ##

Short broke and ran through craft, A vanilla-plus adventure modpack centered around the Create Aeronautics mod!

This modpack focuses on exploration and vanilla, the only mods that add notable features are Create, its several add-ons, such as [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics), [Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry), which focuses on automating enchanting, and [Copycats](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats), which adds a whole new layer to building, with customizable vertical slabs, slices, stairs, and much more. Theres also [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts), which encourages exploration with powerful treasure items that cant be crafted.

## Backported Features ## 

most features from the newer Minecraft updates have been backported to 1.21.1, Use modern Minecraft mechanics with the latest version of the [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), Includes [Happy Ghasts, and the Pale Garden.](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)
    
## Performance Upgrades ## 

With [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), and much much more, your framerate will likely be more than playing vanilla. Iris also allows for shaders to be used, without sacrificing performance.


![30 FPS to 300 FPS with the mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wjSO34OI/images/6772292f92face38989199f2f3ff03f9adf2a2b2.png)

## Quality of life ## 

SB&RC is chalked full of Quality of Life mods to make the game more beautiful, and minimize the annoying parts of Minecraft. Mods like [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort),  [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-lights), and more, simplify the minor annoyances one would have. While mods like [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), make the game infinitely more beautiful!
